originalTitle: Apex Legends x Cyberpunk Event Trailer
content: Welcome to the Apex Legends x Cyberpunk Event, where the neon lights of E-District beckon in Wildcard and Cyberware floods the streets. But be careful: reports of Cyberpsychosis are on the rise. Hunt down the Mythic Skippy Alternator and Iconic Legend skins, and earn Eddies throughout the event to spend in the Reward Shop. The Apex Legends x Cyberpunk Event goes live July 14. Learn more: http://x.ea.com/apxl/cyberpunk-event Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox® One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch™ 2, and PC via EA App, Epic Games Store and Steam: http://x.ea.com/57366. Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710 Follow us on X: https://twitter.com/playapex Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/ Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@playapex/ Credits: Production company: Electronic Arts & Dark Burn Creative Sound design and mix: Respawn Entertainment & Mass Audio All other categories: Electronic Arts & Respawn Entertainment *Applicable platform account and platform subscription (sold separately) may be required. Persistent internet connection and EA Account required. Age restrictions apply. This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.
chineseTitle: | 《 | A | p | e | x | | 英 | 雄 | 》 | x | | 赛 | 博 | 朋 | 克 | 活 | 动 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 欢迎来到 Apex Legends x Cyber​​punk 活动，E-District 的霓虹灯将在 Wildcard 和 Cyber​​ware 中淹没街道。但要小心：网络精神病的报道正在增加。寻找神话 Skippy Alternator 和标志性传奇皮肤，并在整个活动中赚取艾迪，在奖励商店中消费。 Apex Legends x Cyber​​punk 活动将于 7 月 14 日上线。了解更多信息：http://x.ea.com/apxl/cyberpunk-event Apex Legends™ 是一款免费*大逃杀游戏，传奇人物在边境边缘为荣耀、名誉和财富而战。立即通过 EA App、Epic Games Store 和 Steam 在 PlayStation®4、PlayStation®5、Xbox® One、Xbox Series X|S、Nintendo Switch™ 2 和 PC 上免费畅玩：http://x.ea.com/57366。查看我们的 YouTube 频道：http://x.ea.com/56710 在 X 上关注我们：https://twitter.com/playapex 在 Instagram 上关注我们：https://www.instagram.com/playapex/ 在 TikTok 上关注我们：https://www.tiktok.com/@playapex/ 制作人员：Electronic Arts & Dark Burn Creative 声音设计和混音：Respawn Entertainment & Mass Audio 所有其他类别：Electronic Arts & Respawn Entertainment *适用的平台帐户和平台可能需要订阅（单独出售）。需要持续的互联网连接和 EA 帐户。年龄有限制。该游戏包括可选的游戏内购买虚拟货币，可用于获取虚拟游戏内物品，包括随机选择的虚拟游戏内物品。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
